regions: Europe, the Middle East, and Africa (EMEA)

supply_chain.dependencies: Reliance on Amazon Web Services for hosting and delivery of platform; reliance on third-party payment service providers including payment card networks, banks, payment processors, and payment gateways; reliance on third-party service providers for community support operations; reliance on Google Maps for maps and location data
supply_chain.risks: Dependence on AWS for platform hosting with limited redundancy; reliance on third-party payment processors that could become unavailable or increase fees; reliance on third-party community support providers for vast majority of customer support; potential disruptions from third-party service provider failures or security incidents; single points of failure in payment processing and data hosting infrastructure

regulatory_risks: Short-term rental regulations and restrictions at city, state, country, and regional levels
Onerous restrictions on short-term rentals in certain cities (e.g., New York City de facto ban)
EU Short-Term Rental (STR) Regulation compliance requirements
Lodging tax collection and remittance obligations with potential joint liability with hosts
Withholding tax obligations on payments made to hosts
Transactional taxes (sales, VAT, business, digital service taxes) with significant uncertainty
Data privacy and data security laws (EU GDPR, UK GDPR, CCPA, state-level privacy laws)
Digital Services Act (DSA) compliance in EU
Online Safety Act 2023 in UK
AI and machine learning regulations (EU AI Act, California AI laws, Colorado Artificial Intelligence Act)
Payment services regulations (PSD2, UK PSR, proposed PSD3/EU PSR)
Anti-money laundering (AML) and counter-terrorist financing (CTF) regulations
Economic and trade sanctions (OFAC, OFSI, Luxembourg Ministry of Finance)
Consumer protection laws (CFPB regulations, UK and EU consumer protection)
Insurance regulatory requirements for travel insurance products
Environmental regulations and climate-related disclosure requirements (CSRD, CSDDD in EU)
Tax law changes including OECD Pillar Two global minimum tax
Inflation Reduction Act corporate alternative minimum tax (CAMT) and excise tax on share repurchases
Investment Company Act compliance requirements
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) and UK Bribery Act 2010 compliance

sanction_risks: Economic and trade sanctions from OFAC, OFSI, and Luxembourg authorities restricting transactions with certain countries, regions, and individuals
Potential future sanctions in key business areas that could materially impact operations
Risk of inadvertent transactions inconsistent with sanctions laws despite internal controls
Compliance requirements with sanctions watch lists and screening procedures
